title: MGN 586 (F) Amendment 2 ILO work in fishing convention, 2007 - medical care
body: "This notice should be read with the The Merchant Shipping (Work in Fishing Convention) Regulations 2018 and replaces MGN 586 (F) amendment 1.  Amendment 2 updates references and NHS details at section 3.  Section 5 reference information is under review.  Please email workinfishing.convention@mcga.gov.uk with any enquiries.  Notice to   fishing vessel owners operators and managers employers of fishermen skippers officers and fishermen on fishing vessels.  "

taxons.title: Safe and compliant operation of vessels
